svg.title: Methodology: LLM-based actionable extraction and ModeX-set reconciliation pipeline
svg.desc: Five-phase pipeline: five LLMs extract actionables, STS15 calibrates theta, ModeX-set reconciles candidates, outputs are logged, and a second panel scores soundness and precision.
svg.text: Each extracts: actionable · impact · evidence · confidence → saved to CSV
merged string = rec · impact · evidence | intra-model α = 0.15 | support = # distinct models per cluster
no-actionable responses handled · singletons below min-support discarded · parallel via ProcessPoolExecutor
Is this actionable sound? · Is it precise? → each model answers YES / NO independently
sound: YES / NO · precise: YES / NO
